signals.text: Strong 30d performance per Mar 23 Granola notes: $28K revenue, 538 purchases, 56% subscription rate (well above benchmark), 1.38% CVR
Upcoming bi-weekly call scheduled for Apr 20 -- regular cadence maintained with 4 future calls booked through Jun 1
Tom Fitzpatrick (Dir of Ecommerce) highly engaged and self-sufficient on FERMAT platform per Mar 9 intro call with Pulkit
Active experimentation: flavor selector vs best sellers bundle tests, Spanish language funnel launched, gift-with-purchase campaign in progress
FERMAT metrics API authentication failed -- cannot verify live platform performance data this refresh
Underperforming funnel flagged on Mar 23: Doctor Backed Generic Fiber v1 -- $5K ad spend, only 0.19% CVR
Meta/TikTok reconnection still pending since Feb 19 call -- needs follow-up to ensure ad platform integrations are current

performance._note: FERMAT metrics API requires authentication -- could not retrieve daily metrics this refresh. Granola notes from Mar 23 report 30d figures: $28K revenue, 538 purchases, $52 AOV, 1.38% CVR.

recent.title: BelliWelli <> FERMAT | Bi-Weekly Check In
recent.participants: Talia Cohen (FERMAT), Tom Fitzpatrick (belliwelli), Morry Mitrani (belliwelli)
recent.summary: Tom inquired about implementing a gift-with-purchase offer for excess inventory (cucumber and yuzu flavors). Talia advised setting up core offer in Skio then using FERMAT display-only offer feature. Also discussed optimizing funnels by moving product cards above lengthy text to combat scroll fatigue and adding more CTAs.
action_items: Tag Tom in Slack with message about reconnecting TikTok and Meta
Conduct review of all funnels to identify low-hanging fruit for optimization
Provide 2-3 bullet points of feedback on funnels
Review the test version of funnel experiment before launch

recent.title: BelliWelli <> FERMAT | Business Review
recent.participants: Tom Fitzpatrick (belliwelli), Morry (belliwelli), Mia DyBuncio (FERMAT), Talia Cohen (FERMAT)
recent.summary: Business review covering AI Search, Funnel Builder performance, competitive landscape, and renewal/expansion discussion. Executive present. Objections raised about competitor alternatives. Agency (Power Digital) involved in discussion.
action_items: Set up deck for business review
Walk through performance during business review
Discuss AI Search feature in more detail

recent.title: BelliWelli <> FERMAT | Bi-Weekly Check In
recent.participants: Talia Cohen (FERMAT), Tom Fitzpatrick (belliwelli), Morry Mitrani (belliwelli)
recent.summary: Tom shared updates on new pricing restructuring (following Groons model), 4-in-1 hydration gummies launch, and Spanish funnel plans. Talia introduced the free AI Search trial. Tom expressed strong interest and said they are ready to increase ad spend. Active A/B testing ongoing: 30 vs 90 day supply, flavor selector vs best sellers bundle.
action_items: Prepare AI Search trial deep dive for business review

calls.analysis: BelliWelli has a strong cadence of bi-weekly check-ins with executive participation. Recent Glyphic calls (all pre-handoff from Talia) focused on gift-with-purchase for excess inventory, scroll fatigue optimization, AI Search trial interest, and Spanish language funnel expansion. Tom Fitzpatrick is the primary contact and has become an advanced FERMAT user. Account was handed off from Talia to Pulkit in early March 2026.

email.analysis: Email activity for belliwelli in the last 30 days is dominated by Meta ad approval notifications (9 of 10 emails), indicating active ad campaigns running through FERMAT funnels. One Loom video view notification for a 'Belliwelli Issue' video was recorded on Apr 1. No direct brand-to-CSM correspondence found in this search -- communication likely happens primarily via Slack channel.
